_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Keep-Alive Scheduler

steps.description: Database: KeepAliveConfig (singleton), KeepAliveSlot (time slots), KeepAliveRun (execution log) models + Alembic migration with config seed row
Backend: orch/keep_alive_service.py (CRUD, due-slot detection, subprocess fire, run logging, randomized message pool) + orch/daemon/keep_alive_poller.py + daemon wiring in main.py
Code review of S01 + S02 (models, migration, service, poller, daemon wiring)
API: dashboard/routers/keep_alive.py (7 routes: page, config POST, slots CRUD, runs GET) + register in dashboard/app.py
Frontend: keep_alive.html page + 4 htmx fragments (slots, slot-row, timeline, runs) + base.html nav entry + make css
Tests: unit (due-slot logic, retry, fire_claude, message randomization) + integration (CRUD, FK SET NULL) + dashboard (all routes)
Cross-layer global review: cross-contract alignment, security (no shell=True), invariants, completeness
QV: Browser verification — /system/keep-alive page, slot add/toggle/delete, timeline, runs table, config save, no regressions
